Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10891 0 0}I'm not one for taking days off from practice. That's BS.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}That's why nobody on the team can know about my knee...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}I've been doing track since middle school, and they're telling me to stop now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}Dude, at this rate, I'm gonna end up like one of those freaks on the news...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10872 0 0}You know, that Apathy Syndrome thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10827 0 0}Well, gee, thanks for your "concern," man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}I'll have you know, I'm not as tough as I look.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto seems offended by what I said.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10875 0 0}{f 5 13 8 30 105}I-I was just kidding, man... I'm fine, promise! I'll show up to practice and everything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}I'm sure I can hide my knee injury... somehow. Thanks for looking out for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto seems to be happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10852 0 0}{f 5 13 8 15 105}Yep, just gotta make sure to keep my cool even if my knee starts hurting... Can't have the team find out and all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}I can't even imagine NOT going to practice after school. I have to power through this somehow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Miyamoto looks grim.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10885 0 0}Well, gotta get my fill of nutrients if I wanna recover.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}We athletes gotta take care of ourselves when we're not on the track![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After enjoying a meal together,[n]I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
